title: Church of St Mary Magdalene, Hucknall
body: St Mary Magdalene’s church in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire, is a parish church in the Church of England dedicated to Jesus' companion Mary Magdalene. The church is Grade II* listed as it is a particularly significant building of more than local interest.
categories: Church of England church buildings in Nottinghamshire
